summary: This document is a landing page for a service called Stunt, which enables users to quickly create viral videos using AI. Users can paste a link to an existing viral video, and the AI character will recreate it, promising to generate new content in just 60 seconds. The service aims to help users create popular videos easily and is free to sign up.
